infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs your location to find nearby vets and clinics.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs your location for live tracking in emergencies.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs camera access to capture your pet's photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs photo library access to upload pet photos and medical reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs permission to save photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs microphone access for video consultations.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs calendar access to add appointments and reminders.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: PetCare+ needs contacts access for emergency contact features.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: PetCare+ uses Face ID to unlock your saved login session.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PetCare+ needs location to find nearby vets and track in emergencies.

plugins.photosPermission: PetCare+ needs access to your photos to upload pet images.
plugins.cameraPermission: PetCare+ needs camera access to capture your pet's photo.

plugins.calendarPermission: PetCare+ needs calendar access to add appointments and reminders.

plugins.photosPermission: PetCare+ needs access to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: PetCare+ needs permission to save photos.

plugins.faceIDPermission: PetCare+ uses Face ID to unlock your saved login session.
